title: Genetically Modified Organisms: Sanofi Pasteur, Inc.  (24/R56/01)
body: "Consent documents for Sanofi Pasteur, Inc. to release a genetically modified organism, reference 24/R56/01.  Each consent granted includes:   consent letter (confirming consent and outlining any conditions) part A1-A6: Information required under schedule 1 of the Genetically Modified Organisms (Deliberate Release) regulations 2002 part B: Information about the release application to be included on the public register   ACRE advice  ACRE advice: application for a vaccine trial of genetically modified Respiratory Syncytial Virus (24/R56/01) "
